title: ヒシアマ姐さんも勝てない？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Hishi Amazon visits an amusement park
with her fellow dorm residents.

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, do you wanna try the haunted house next?
Rumor is, they've got real ghosts! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I'll stay here and look after our stuff. You
guys go have fun.

text_block_list.name: Miho Student B
text_block_list.text: But, it's no fair to make you keep watch...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Don't feel bad! I was lookin' to take a breather
anyway. Go on, knock yourselves out!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That was a close one. There's no way I'm admitting that ghosts scare me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you can't even fight 'em... Ugh, just the
thought of them gives me chills!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking of her phasmophobia starts to take a
toll on Hishi Amazon, and she begins to feel
unwell.
